attributes.description: Draws the option in a disabled state, preventing selection.
attributes.name: disabled

attributes.description:
The option's value. When selected, the containing form control will receive this value. The value must be unique
from other options in the same group. Values may not contain spaces, as spaces are used as delimiters when listing
multiple values.
attributes.name: value

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the prefix.
cssParts.name: prefix

cssParts.description: The container that wraps the suffix.
cssParts.name: suffix

methods.description: Returns a plain text label based on the option's content.
methods.name: getTextLabel

methods.description: Replaces any occurrences of the delimiter in the option's original value with underscores.
methods.name: sanitizeValueForDelimiter

properties.description: Draws the option in a disabled state, preventing selection.
properties.name: disabled

properties.description:
The option's value. When selected, the containing form control will receive this value. The value must be unique
from other options in the same group. Values may not contain spaces, as spaces are used as delimiters when listing
multiple values.
properties.name: value

slots.description: Used to prepend an icon or similar element to the menu item.
slots.name: prefix

slots.description: Used to append an icon or similar element to the menu item.
slots.name: suffix

summary: Options define the selectable items within various form controls such as [select](/components/select).
